hooks.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath // empty"); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.(tsx?|jsx?|css|scss)$"; then echo "Reminder: Run formatter (prettier/eslint) on $FILE before committing."; fi'
hooks.description: Formatting reminder after writing frontend code files
